summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No canonical was declared, low-signal closeout and fix/merge paths are disabled, and the hydrated artifact reports no security-sensitive items. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently for maintainer/backlog review; refs whose live state was unavailable due to GitHub rate limiting are scoped needs_human because target kind and target_updated_at are missing.
